Iksar Hide Mask  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Iksar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 38
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Iksar Hide Mask
Lore Item
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Iksar (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 38
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:5 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1066
Submitted By:Radia

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:02:09
Page Updated:Wed Jan 11th, 2023

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 125,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name

Trakanon's Teeth

very fast to get
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2018 at 3:03 PM Rating: Decent

3 posts
1st Harbinger Dronik killed, mask picked up.
Item easy to have because it's common. Even at 85lvl, lots of aggro.
I just kill foragers and all named mobs. Appox time : 2h

Spawn
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2008 at 1:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591965014650
7 posts
Exact area hes in: the river left of lake on map he spawns north of the river in the middle of the river between the lake and swamp of no hope, hes a odd spawn i camped 4 hours with ranger killing all foragers seen alot of random nameds but not him so i give up. then im running my bard there (lvl 55). i pop up track hes up. so the group i was with/rl friends on their alts killed him and got it to drop.

Boogs 80th war Antonius Bayle

Edited, Dec 4th 2008 4:55pm by BoogsEQ
▲ Page top
Rare spawn?
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2008 at 7:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591837568044
Scholar
257 posts
I have killed numerous Foragers and every KOS named I see up. I have spent 5 hours in TT killing them with a tracking Ranger. I have killed the named off at least 3 times for each named I have seen .....and still no Harbringer. Dragontail X4, Champion X3, Skelly dude with a pet X3, Silvermane X3, Bloodeye X3, Ghostly dude in hut X3, 2 different named Frogloks X2 each.... not one Harbringer. Seems to be a rare spawn with uncommon loot = Raster ! lol

Will post a follow up later on to see how long killing the mentioned mobs takes to spawn the pos Harbringer guy.

Edited, Mar 1st 2008 10:26pm by Olrec

Took around 2 hours to get... I slaughtered with my 72 necro, downside was the none tracking.

After an hour of being in Trak's teeth, ranger friend of mine joined me and it was slightly easier. Killed a couple of named while we waited so he didn't leave empty handed either.

Iksar hide mask
QuoteReply

I have killed Harbinger Dronik numerous times. I farm him whenever I can. Every time I have killed him, he has dropped the mask. Which would make it a very common drop, not very rare. Also, on the Bristlebane server they sell in the Bazaar for between 10 and 17k depending on the number of traders selling it.

To easy for the price
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2005 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592768245427
24 posts
I dont think this is worth the price for a bard, Just kite for it yourself. I went to traks teeth and kited for about 2 hours, got 5 diffrent names to spawn and got some cool loot, plus this mask
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 30 2005 at 2:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As of last patch a sneaky move was made, they need not be equipped to cast, not sure how long this will be but I can click it from my inventory on my trader and go iksar and im highelf trader. :) sold one for 63k otherday, some reason the obtenabrate mask goes for 120+ ?
RE: need not be equipped
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2005 at 5:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592271837063
3 posts
"I can click it from my inventory on my trader and go iksar and im highelf trader." -The One and Only JonaHelmDragonfriend


Went to TT on 11 March 05 and spent about 2 hours getting the mask to drop. I am an Erudite SK and I can tell you that this mask does not work from inventory or bags for all race/class combos.

I call BS. Because of the previous post people are trying to charge mad money for this thing. I thought I should find out for myself let you all know before you spend your hard earned PP



Edited, Fri Mar 11 17:09:18 2005

# Oct 26 2005 at 1:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592277850657
14 posts
This mask is rogu/bard only and clicks from inventory for those classes. It does not work for any other class, like the mask of the deceiver does.

# Jul 23 2005 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent

I can confirm that this DOES work from inventory, just not from bags(as with any clicky). i have tried it on all of my characters and my friends' characters to see the different race/class combos, worked on bards/rogues ONLY.

RE: need not be equipped
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2005 at 12:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344441444
Scholar
811 posts
*coughs* check description it is bard/rogue only so no wonder as a druid it does not work
▲ Page top
RE: need not be equipped
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2005 at 4:54 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592272128401
Scholar
60 posts
I'm well aware of what the item description says.. notice it does not say "MUST EQUIP" therefore one might assume that it can be clicked by anyone from inventory (one item that I know for a fact you can do this with is the Forlorn Scepter that drops from the King in the Warrens).

I was commenting that the poster above me claimed that it works from inventory with all races and CLASSES. That is flat out wrong.
▲ Page top
RE: need not be equipped
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2005 at 11:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760803480
View User Forum
277 posts
Although readers beware, some items which are flagged as certain classes only can be clicked from inventory by people who aren't one of those classes. This isn't one of those things.
▲ Page top
RE: need not be equipped
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2008 at 11:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791773746
View User Forum
14 posts
I know this is an old post, but just thought I'd clarify something. There are 3 descriptions for clickies.
1.) Must Equip (quite obviously you must be able to wear it to click it)
2.) Any Slot/Can Equip (Can be clicked from inventory if it is usable by your race/class)
3.) Any Slot (Any character may click this from inv, regardless of race/class/diety)
▲ Page top

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 11 2004 at 10:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok i know it says bard/rogue only, but it doesn't say must equip! does that mean that ANY class can cast it? i have being a huge guy =/
Fun kill for 56 druid
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2004 at 12:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791112164
13 posts
just dropped this guy with my 56 druid for the second time. Tossed on my resist spells and buffed cold resist to 96 (pretty low I know) .... well he landed one ice comet and had me down to 30%. Rooted him and doted him with drifting and winged, tossing on drones from the ESV. Fight lasted few mins and now my 44 bard has the mask for the second time. Fun kill and always gets my heart racing when I seem him on track. GL to all in the future.

Fernoff Wunderlust
Zurrito Dancingbean
Tholuxe Paells
▲ Page top
Easyest kill ever
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2004 at 12:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592790518827
2 posts
Did this guy today will doing my OS key, me a 55 pally with 4.2k hp and 1100 AC killled him with one heal from a 60 druid, plus the add. just kept him stunned really a easy kill dont no why they are so much.
▲ Page top
Beware the Crusaders
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2004 at 6:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592792407308
View User Forum
57 posts
Finally got this mask fro my 45 wood elf bard and thought I would try and beef up my faction with the Iksar. As I as turning in bone chips to Trooper Mozo a Crusader hissed and HT'ed me at which point all the guards jumped me and before I could run I was dead.
Do the SK Iksar Crusaders see through illusions?
▲ Page top
RE: Beware the Crusaders
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2004 at 12:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344491328
Sage
150 posts
Not really sure about the religion thing, but i have been working on cabalis faction with a ralos zek worshiping ogre. Had killed explorers till i hade enough faction to turn in a bag plus full of explorer knives, by the time i finished this was max ally with legion of cabalis and i guess you can't get more then indiff with the troopers. At this point was still KoS to the crusaders. No on to bonechips, i have turned in close to 20 stacks to mozo, still indiff to troopers and still KoS to crusaders altho now threatingly rather than scowls. Religion may effect it i don't know, but faction is getting better with them.
▲ Page top
RE: Beware the Crusaders
QuoteReply
# Feb 29 2004 at 12:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
*All* mobs can see your religion, so if you're worshipping, for example, Tunare, Iksars will KOS you. Use your faction song on them next time, and see if that helps, if they're around when you're handing things in.
▲ Page top
RE: Beware the Crusaders
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2004 at 6:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766675380
Scholar
222 posts
If I remember correctly, Crusaders can sense your religion, or something like that... essentially, you don't want crusaders around when you're doing the hand ins... it's not that they can see through the illusion as much as they know you don't have iksar faction, or whatever.
▲ Page top
A little annoying but not bad
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2003 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260424435
5 posts
I camped this last night. As an FYI, the foragers spawn just east of the SoNH zone line. Finding the first one can be a MAJOR pain, but after you kill it the other one will spawn in the same general area. These guys can move to! Have a tracker on hand (I soloed the cycle with a 62 druid np) They pop right after you kill one, so there is always one up. The named spawn in the same area as the foragers as well. I killed about 10-15 foragers before the first named (Commander Sils) popped. 5 more foragers after that Harbinger Dronik popped. He was an easy kill, snare and nuke till dead. I had a stun memed incase he decided to cast on me, but that never happened.
▲ Page top
over 10k on EMARR??
QuoteReply
# Nov 17 2003 at 7:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786983773
3 posts
Does anyone have any idea why people on Emarr are trying to sell this for 10k-20k? Have they stopped dropping??
▲ Page top
RE: over 10k on EMARR??
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2004 at 4:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261119820
25 posts
Quote:
Does anyone have any idea why people on Emarr are trying to sell this for 10k-20k? Have they stopped dropping??


Nobody goes to Seb anymore so nobody kills Foragers / Hunters so named don't spawn so rare items from TT never drop anymore so prices go up.

The cost of most Kunark loot is increasing.
▲ Page top
RE: over 10k on EMARR??

▲ Page top
Concerning regeneration
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2003 at 1:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778888393
46 posts
Just to note, the effect on this mask is exactly the same as the level 20 enchanter spell Illusion: Iksar. My enchanter has this spell, and the Iksar illusion DOES grant the regen, just like the Troll illusion grants regen and Dark Elf illusion grants ultravision, etc. Also, have a 38 rogue friend who confirmed this for me, it does give regen. Just hope to clear this controversy up :)
▲ Page top
RE: Concerning regeneration
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2003 at 12:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966214912
Scholar
281 posts
as a note: iksar and troll illusions do grant *a* regen, but not *the* regen... it adds 1hp/tick to your normal regen. I never tried the mask, I do not know how it works, but that is how the enchanter spells act on regen.
▲ Page top
RE: Concerning regeneration
QuoteReply
# Dec 11 2003 at 1:30 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1683505057400
151 posts
You can look directly in the spell.dat file and iksar illusion does NOT grant regen, where the troll illusion does
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 2:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779075409
32 posts
Does this mask bestow any sort of iksar-like regeneration?

QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2003 at 4:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781985618
3 posts
Can we carry this and mask of deception??
▲ Page top
RE: Two masks
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 10:39 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591787710499
36 posts
Yes. There's no reason why you wouldn't be able to. I've got Mask of Deception and Mask of Obtenebration (Erudite mask), and carry both with me all the time. Both are clickable from inventory which is nice. Only mask I know of that isnt is the Burnoose of the Half-breed (Half-Elf mask)... which has to be equipped to cast.
▲ Page top
Usable from slot?
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2003 at 10:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781171842
151 posts
Can this item be used by other classes that are not Bard or Rogue, as from an inventory slot, or is this only usable when equiped?
▲ Page top
RE: Usable from slot?
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 3:57 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591765923498
Guru
170 posts
No, they can not. You must be either a Rogue or Bard to use these Masks.
▲ Page top
RE: Usable from slot?
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 2:49 PM Rating: Good
Railus
Guru
1,088 posts
Generally if your class/race/deity isn't listed on the item, you can't use it. While I can't speak for this item specifically, I've come across items where this is the case and would assume this to be no different.

When trying to trigger the effect from inventory, I'd get the "Your race/class/deity cannot use the item" message (or something to that effect..).

Edited, Fri Mar 14 14:15:37 2003
____________________________
http://everquest.allakhazam.com
▲ Page top
RE: Usable from slot?
QuoteReply
# May 12 2003 at 2:09 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592791186594
Scholar
42 posts
Not that it matters, but an interesting piece of related info. A long long time ago (we're talking pre-kunark) the mask of deception WAS clickable by anyone from the inventory slot. Well I guess as of last year VI hadn't nerfed the pre-existing ones. So if you play on a very old server, you just may see a dark elf running around with twin lightning swords (Ranger class)

But as it is now, Railus is correct. You must be a Bard or a Rogue to click this item from your inventory.

Edited, Mon May 12 02:29:41 2003
